data.body: [enwiki] Primate city — Removed. There is no primate city here. The two largest city propers: [[Quezon City]] and [[Manila]], are not very far from each other in terms of population (3 mil+ for QC vs 1.8 mil+ for Manila). [[Metro Manila]] and [[Metro Cebu]] are not cities but are [[metropolitan areas in the Philippines]]. The 16 other units comprising Met. Mla. (like [[Quezon City]] and [[Makati]]) are independent cities (and town of [[Pateros]]) with elected mayors. Met. Mla does NOT have an elected mayor.
data.author: JWilz12345
data.title: Primate city
